Title: Requires certain information to be provided at the point of sale of bicycles with electric assist and electric scooters
Summary: Requires certain information to be provided in the form of a card or pamphlet at the point of sale of every bicycle with electric assist or electric scooter.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to requiring certain information to be provided at the point of sale of bicycles with electric assist and electric scooters
